languages.text: "К единству — мы должны найти миры, утерянные в веках и помочь им. Вместе мы сильнее".
"Unity — we must find worlds that have been lost to time and help them. Together we are stronger."
languages.original_text: "К единству — мы должны найти миры, утерянные в веках и помочь им. Вместе мы сильнее".

traits.locale_text: "Unity — we must find worlds that have been lost to time and help them. Together we are stronger."
"Unity — we must find worlds that have been lost to time and help them. Together we are stronger."
"Unity — we must find worlds that have been lost to time and help them. Together we are stronger."

languages.text: 「団結―失われた世界を見つけ、助けなければならない。共にいれば強くなる」
languages.original_text: "Unity — we must find worlds that have been lost to time and help them. Together we are stronger."

traits.locale_text: 「団結―失われた世界を見つけ、助けなければならない。共にいれば強くなる。」

languages.text: “团结——我们必须找到那些失落于时间长河的世界，施以援手。团结起来，我们才能更强大。”
languages.original_text: "Unity — we must find worlds that have been lost to time and help them. Together we are stronger."

traits.locale_text: “团结——我们必须找到那些失落于时间长河的世界，施以援手。团结起来，我们才能更强大。”

languages.text: «La unidad: debemos encontrar mundos caídos en el olvido y ayudarlos. Juntos somos más fuertes».
languages.original_text: "Unity — we must find worlds that have been lost to time and help them. Together we are stronger."

traits.locale_text: «La unidad: debemos encontrar mundos caídos en el olvido y ayudarlos. Juntos somos más fuertes».

languages.text: "Nach Einheit ... wir müssen vergessene Welten finden und ihnen helfen. Gemeinsam sind wir stärker."
languages.original_text: "Unity — we must find worlds that have been lost to time and help them. Together we are stronger."

traits.locale_text: "Nach Einheit ... wir müssen vergessene Welten finden und ihnen helfen. Gemeinsam sind wir stärker."

languages.text: « L'unité. Nous devons trouver des mondes tombés dans l'oubli et leur apporter notre aide. Ensemble, nous sommes plus forts. »
languages.original_text: "Unity — we must find worlds that have been lost to time and help them. Together we are stronger."

traits.locale_text: « L'unité. Nous devons trouver des mondes tombés dans l'oubli et leur apporter notre aide. Ensemble, nous sommes plus forts. »

languages.text: "Birlik. Zamana yenik düşmüş dünyaları bulmalı ve onlara yardım etmeliyiz. Birlikte daha güçlüyüz."
languages.original_text: "Unity — we must find worlds that have been lost to time and help them. Together we are stronger."

traits.locale_text: "Birlik. Zamana yenik düşmüş dünyaları bulmalı ve onlara yardım etmeliyiz. Birlikte daha güçlüyüz."
